nodes.rawBody:
--- index: 8 language: en --- ### Shaahin System **2021** Truck traffic management and bulk freight management system at the port level, this system includes two user interfaces: mobile application (used by port loaders to record traffic), web application (to define basic data, allocation and view statistics and status).
In the mentioned system, all database structures are defined as abstract, and therefore it is possible that the above software can be used to manage the movement of goods in all land, sea and air transport terminals. #### Information - **Applicant**: [Blue Sea Persian Gulf Company](https://bluespg.com/) - **Employer**: [Mobtaker Darya Company](https://mbdr.ir/) - **Link**: [http://shaahin.bluespg.com/](http://shaahin.bluespg.com/)

---
index: 7
language: en
---

### Loopback4 DataProvider for ReactAdmin

**2020**

Loopback 4 DataProvider Library For use in the React Admin framework, this library is implemented in TypeScript.

#### Information

-   **Type**: Open Source
-   **Link**: [http://github.com/loopback4/ra-data-lb4](http://github.com/loopback4/ra-data-lb4)

### Loopback Component CRUD

**2019**

CRUD REST Api library with authentication and authorization capabilities, this library is implemented in NodeJS language with the help of Loopback4 framework.

#### Information

-   **Type**: Open Source
-   **Link**: [http://github.com/loopback4/loopback-component-crud](http://github.com/loopback4/loopback-component-crud)

--- index: 3 language: en --- ### Managed Funds System **2018** System of granting facilities from the place of managed funds, this system includes a user interface: web application (card of applicants and system experts).
In this system, all processes are implemented in the BPMN2 standard language. #### Information - **Applicant**: Ports and Maritime Organization of the Islamic Republic of Iran - **Employer**: [TIS Company](https://tis-co.ir/)

--- index: 2 language: en --- ### Admin Bot **2017** Telegram group management and spam prevention bot, this bot is implemented in NodeJS language and using Telegraf library.
In the mentioned bot, Sequelize ORM converter has been used to communicate with the database. #### Information - **Type**: Open Source - **Link**: [http://github.com/Azhant/AdminBot](http://github.com/Azhant/AdminBot)

---
index: 1
language: en
---

### Govara

**2015**

Warehouse Management and Invoicing Software, This software includes an interface: a desktop application (implemented in C++ and QML).

#### Information

-   **Type**: Open Source
-   **Link**: [http://github.com/ckoliber/govara](http://github.com/ckoliber/govara)

--- index: 0 language: en --- ### Chapar Messenger (ChaM) **2013** Messenger software with the aim of implementing group voice and video calling capabilities, this messenger includes two user interfaces: mobile application (implemented in Java and C languages), desktop application (implemented in C++ and QML languages) and Server application (implemented by Erlang and C languages).
In this application, all communication protocols are based on TCP / UDP Socket and HTTP protocol is not used. Also, Hole Punching method is used to make P2P calls, and ffmpeg library is used to encode / decode audio and video. #### Information - **Type**: Open Source - **Link**: [http://github.com/ckoliber/cham](http://github.com/ckoliber/cham)
